caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with the word "BOSS" in gold lettering and a circular logo on the chest sits in a studio. He is positioned behind a desk with his hands clasped in front of him, wearing a gold watch. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of him. The background consists of a white wall featuring a repeating logo that says "UNICORN HUSTLE" surrounded by gold stars, and a blue banner above that reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". To the man's left, a black box and a mug with text including "TALK OUT" are visible on the desk. Across the sequence, the man remains in a nearly static pose, slightly shifting his gaze and leaning forward marginally while maintaining his posture.
